data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for milestone-based billing.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific endpoints or data that confirm the implementation of this billing method. The linked use case primarily discusses invoice generation based on total hours and materials without addressing milestone-based invoicing, leading to an inconclusive result regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: Milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing) is not evidenced or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint for milestone-based billing validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the milestone-based billing requirement.
